MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ariella Evelyn Perry, Esq. 213-381-9988 Wilshire Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Alberto Reyna, Esq. 415-278-9400 Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Perry requests an In-camera hearing to avoid violating atty/client privilege. The court reuqires an In-person attendance at an In-camera hearing. The court states it will continue the matter once but will not be inclined to do so again. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Wilshire Law Firm, Atty. Ariellea Perry's Moton to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF ERICA GREENE.

Continued to 12/2/25 at 9am in Dept. 302 for an in-camera hearing. Moving party is ordered to appear in person. Ms. Perry to send notice.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
